Zeuxanthe prismatomeriformis is classified under the family Gesneriaceae. 
This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or Gesneriad family. 
The genus Zeuxanthe is a group of flowering plants that are native to South Africa. 
They are mostly herbaceous perennial plants that thrive in well-drained acidic soil and partial shade.
